questions: You don't expect special treatment from anyone. You've been waiting in line at the DMV for over an hour and someone with an appointment gets called ahead of you. How do you react?
You don't expect special treatment from anyone. You arrive at a fully booked restaurant without a reservation and the host says there's a forty-minute wait. What do you say?
You don't expect special treatment from anyone. Your flight gets delayed three hours and the airline offers a meal voucher but no upgrade. How do you feel about that?
You don't expect special treatment from anyone. A store's return policy won't let you return an item you bought two days past the deadline. How do you handle it?
You don't expect special treatment from anyone. Your neighbor's construction project is noisy during permitted hours but it's disrupting your work-from-home day. What do you think?
You don't expect special treatment from anyone. You order food delivery and it arrives lukewarm, about thirty minutes later than the estimate. What's your response?
You don't expect special treatment from anyone. A customer service agent puts you on hold for fifteen minutes after you called about a billing error on your account. How do you react?
You don't expect special treatment from anyone. You apply for a premium credit card and get rejected despite having good credit. How does that make you feel?
You don't expect special treatment from anyone. Your hotel room doesn't have the view you saw in the online photos and the front desk says no upgrades are available. What do you do?
You don't expect special treatment from anyone. A coworker at your level gets assigned the office with a window while you get the interior cubicle. How do you take it?
